title: Apply PolicyPoint external IDs and pending questions
description:
Update the existing PolicyPoint scorecard setup with the source system external IDs supplied by the user.

Scope:
- Set scorecard external ID to `1562` for `PolicyPoint - Non-Sales`.
- Set score external IDs 48846-48859 for the named questions.
- Create any missing question records where needed.
- Use workbook Items Template rubrics when available for guidelines/configuration.
- Validate any generated or changed guidelines with `skills/guidelines/validate_guidelines.py`.
- Verify final Plexus state by read-back.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started external ID alignment. Rechecked workbook `/Users/ryan/Downloads/SalesFloor_Sales Skills SOW_v2.xlsx`: Items Template still contains populated rubrics for 10 questions only. Missing/pending rows are 48852 Conversational, Not Robotic; 48853 Shows Empathy and Warmth; 48854 Builds Trust and Confidence; 48855 No-Sale Root Cause Classification. Those will be created as administrative score records without champion guideline/config versions until rubrics are supplied.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed external ID alignment and pending question creation. Scorecard `049ac545-c75b-4d36-9c3d-8d58b99db320` now has name `PolicyPoint - Non-Sales`, key `policy-point-non-sales`, external ID `1562`. Verified 14 questions with external IDs 48846-48859 in order. Created pending score records for 48852-48855 without champion versions because their rubric rows are not present in the workbook. Validated the 10 available champion guideline documents from workbook-backed scores.
